heading: Industrial development bonds
label: 1670 Industrial development bonds
notes: References in TextSection 103, referred to in subsec. (a), which related to interest on certain governmental obligations was amended generally by , , , and as so amended relates to interest on State and local bonds. Section 103(b)(2), which prior to the general amendment defined industrial development bond, relates to the applicability of the interest exclusion to arbitrage bonds.Pub. children.heading: Issuance
children.label: a Issuance
children.text: The legislature of the government of American Samoa may cause to be issued after , industrial development bonds (within the meaning of section 103(b)(2) of title 26).September 20, 19841See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Exemption of all bonds from income taxation by State and local governments
children.label: b Exemption of all bonds from income taxation by State and local governments

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The interest on any bond or other obligation issued by or on behalf of the Government of American Samoa shall be exempt from taxation by the Government of American Samoa and the governments of any of the several States, the District of Columbia, any territory or possession of the United States, and any subdivision thereof.

children.heading: Exemption applicable only to income taxes
children.label: 2 Exemption applicable only to income taxes
children.text: The exemption provided by paragraph (1) shall not apply to gift, estate, inheritance, legacy, succession, or other wealth transfer taxes.

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: c Cross reference
children.text: For exclusion of interest for purposes of Federal income taxation, see .section 103 of title 26
